title: Recursion, Recurrences, and Divide-and-Conquer · Structure Brief: Call Tree
summary: Break a large document and spatial search problem into independently checkable subproblems. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa call tree increment in a recursive solver with recurrence evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace call trees, stack depth, repeated subproblems, and returned values.
Define base cases, progress measures, and combination rules before recursive calls.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
